props.name: borderColor
props.description: Sets the border color of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: bordered
props.description: Add borders on all sides of the table and cells.

props.name: borderless
props.description: Remove borders on all sides of the table and cells.

props.name: caption
props.description: Put the `<caption>` on the top of the table.

props.name: captionTop
props.description: Set the text of the table caption and the caption on the top of the table.

props.name: columns
props.description:
Prop for table columns configuration. If prop is not defined, table will display columns based on the first item keys, omitting keys that begins with underscore (e.g. '_props')

In columns prop each array item represents one column. Item might be specified in two ways:
String: each item define column name equal to item value.
Object: item is object with following keys available as column configuration:
- key (required)(String) - define column name equal to item key.
- label (String) - define visible label of column. If not defined, label will be generated automatically based on column name, by converting kebab-case and snake_case to individual words and capitalization of each word.
- _props (Object) - adds classes to all cels in column, ex. _props: { scope: 'col', className: 'custom-class' },
- _style (Object) - adds styles to the column header (useful for defining widths)

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: footer
props.description:
Array of objects or strings, where each element represents one cell in the table footer.

Example items:
['FooterCell', 'FooterCell', 'FooterCell']
or
[{ label: 'FooterCell', _props: { color: 'success' }, ...]

props.name: hover
props.description: Enable a hover state on table rows within a `<CTableBody>`.

props.name: items
small
props.description: Make table more compact by cutting all cell `padding` in half.

props.name: striped
props.description: Add zebra-striping to any table row within the `<CTableBody>`.

props.name: stripedColumns
props.description: Add zebra-striping to any table column.

props.name: tableFootProps
props.description:
Properties that will be passed to the table footer component.

Properties to [CTableFoot](#ctablefoot) component.

props.name: tableHeadProps
props.description:
Properties that will be passed to the table head component.

 Properties to [CTableHead](#ctablehead) component.
